top_signals.title: Bank Rate maintained at 3.75% - June 2026 Monetary Policy Summary and Minutes
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England’s Monetary Policy Committee is responsible for making decisions about Bank Rate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Goldman Strategist Sees Bets in Big Tech During Chip Volatility
top_signals.summary: Big tech stocks could turn more attractive in the artificial intelligence trade as chipmakers show continued volatility, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc. strategist Christian Mueller-Glissmann.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: OpenAI and Anthropic face new AI reality as companies shift from tokenmaxxing to efficiency
top_signals.summary: Companies are tightening their AI budgets to focus on getting a return on their investment, and that could dampen growth rates at OpenAI and Anthropic.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: What will Europe’s heatwave cost?
top_signals.summary: Growing body of research points to economic damage from extreme heat

top_signals.title: FCC votes to toughen rules in bid to better protect undersea cables
top_signals.summary: In an unprecedented move, the FCC also said it plans to mandate that owners and operators of submarine line terminal equipment (SLTE) be licensed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: First-ever EU tripartite agreement signed to boost energy storage
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 26 Jun 2026 The European Commission has rallied a number of EU energy ministers, storage developers and manufacturers, renewable energy developers, energy-consuming industries and financial institutions around the first-ever EU tripartite agreement on energy storage.

top_signals.title: Pride musical at the National Theatre review: I’ve never seen so many people in tears
top_signals.summary: Pride musical at the National Theatre review: ★★★★ Could there be a story more ready-made for a musical than the tale of the unlikely partnership between the gays and the Welsh miners? Based on the true, incredible tale of the miner strikes of 1984 and 1985, and following the brilliant 2014 film of the same [...]
